scripts.postbuild: node --input-type=module -e "import { cpSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); cpSync('src/dashboard', 'dist/dashboard', { recursive: true });"
scripts.prestart: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('.data', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
